text.text: Brenda B. likes this

I’m excited to share that I’ve stepped into a new role as Director of General Surgery, Breast Health, and Plastic Surgery at Sutter Health, effective February 23.

This role is especially meaningful to me. My values and career path have evolved over time, shaped in large part by my own experience as a breast cancer survivor and a patient within this service line. My life was not only saved here, it was changed. 

I’m incredibly grateful for the trust, support, and the amazing teams I’ve had the privilege to work with along the way and honored to now lead on the other side, focused on ensuring our patients receive the same care, compassion, and experience that I did.

Looking forward to what’s ahead! 

#SutterHealth #TeamSutter

description.text: Senior Director of Human Resources | Strategic HR Leadership
description.accessibilityText: Senior Director of Human Resources | Strategic HR Leadership

subDescription.accessibilityText: 1 week ago • Visible to anyone on or off LinkedIn

text.text: Brenda B. liked Justin Bose, CSFS®’s comment on this

Stepping into a HR leadership role in a fast-growing organization has been both energizing and intense.
At JumpstartMD, we’re operating at the intersection of healthcare, metabolic wellness, and growth. That means scaling teams, tightening compliance, strengthening culture, and building infrastructure — all at the same time.

HR isn’t just about policies.

 It’s about:
• Protecting the organization
 • Supporting clinicians and member-facing teams
 • Navigating complex compliance landscapes
 • Driving operational accountability
 • Building scalable systems in a people-first environment


Growth-stage healthcare companies don’t need reactive HR.
 They need strategic HR.
Excited for what we’re building. 🚀

#HealthcareLeadership #HRStrategy #PeopleOperations #WomenInLeadership #MetabolicHealth #WellnessIndustry #ExecutiveLeadership #ScalingOrganizations #HumanResources #GrowthMode #HRinHeels

description.accessibilityText: 6,124 followers

subDescription.accessibilityText: 6 days ago • Visible to anyone on or off LinkedIn

text.text: Brenda B. likes this

Personalized weight loss starts with data — not guesswork. 

At JumpstartMD, our care model begins with a one-on-one session with a clinician to gather critical information, including labs, EKG, and body composition analysis. From there, clinicians and health coaches review each member’s medical history and results to design a truly individualized treatment plan. 

“As Chief Medical Officer and Founder, I believe sustainable health outcomes come from understanding the whole person — not applying one-size-fits-all solutions -- which is why we have members take comprehensive labs, a body composition analysis with our InBody scales, and review medical history to design a truly individualized treatment plan. Your body is unique, your weight care should be too” 

— Sean Bourke, MD
Chief Medical Officer & Founder, JumpstartMD

description.accessibilityText: 6,124 followers

subDescription.accessibilityText: 1 month ago • Visible to anyone on or off LinkedIn

text.text: Brenda B. likes this

Testosterone is often overlooked in conversations about perimenopause and menopause—but its impact on women’s health is significant 📊 As estrogen and progesterone decline, testosterone levels frequently drop as well, contributing to fatigue, diminished motivation, brain fog, loss of muscle mass, increased abdominal fat, and changes in sexual health. 

Despite the evidence, testosterone is rarely discussed or treated in women. At JumpstartMD, we take a comprehensive, data-driven approach to hormone care, ensuring women receive personalized treatment that supports both current quality of life and long-term health. 

👉 Visit https://jsmd.us/3Zfb7sO to learn more or schedule your free consultation today. 

#WomensHealth #MenopauseCare #Perimenopause #HormoneOptimization #TestosteroneForWomen #HealthcareInnovation #JumpstartMD

subDescription.accessibilityText: 2 months ago • Visible to anyone on or off LinkedIn

text.text: Brenda B. likes this

Why I’m Running for ASRT Radiation Therapy Chapter Delegate – 

I’m running for ASRT Radiation Therapy Chapter Delegate because our profession is at a pivotal moment—and we need experienced, engaged voices at the table.

Every day, radiation therapists face increasing pressures:
• Scope-of-practice challenges
• Reimbursement changes that impact patient access
• Workforce shortages and burnout
• Ongoing fights for professional recognition and licensure consistency

As an ASRT Ambassador for Advocacy, I’ve seen firsthand how policy decisions—often made without our input—directly affect our ability to care for patients and practice at the top of our license.
I’m running to ensure therapists are not just represented, but heard.

If elected, I will:
•Advocate for strong, consistent licensure and scope protections
•Support fair reimbursement that reflects our expertise and value
•Elevate the voices of frontline therapists, technologists, educators, and students
•Strengthen collaboration between ASRT, state leadership, and local members

This role isn’t about a title—it’s about service, accountability, and action.
I believe in showing up, doing the work, and fighting for the future of our profession. I would be honored to earn your support and represent Radiation Therapists as your ASRT Chapter Delegate.

Thank you for all you do—for your patients, your colleagues, and our profession.

#ASRT #RadiologicTechnology #HOD #RTAdvocacy  #ProfessionalRecognition #StayRAD

subDescription.accessibilityText: 1 month ago • Visible to anyone on or off LinkedIn

text.text:
I’m honored to be running for Radiation Therapy Chapter Delegate.
Throughout my career as a radiation therapist, administrator, and advocate, I’ve seen firsthand how critical it is for our profession to have strong, informed representation at the national level. Decisions made today directly affect patient access, professional scope, reimbursement, education, and the future of our workforce.
My commitment as a delegate is simple:
 • Listen to radiation therapists
 • Advocate for patient-centered, evidence-based care
 • Protect access to treatment options
 • Ensure radiation therapists have a voice in policy and professional decisions
I believe transparency, communication, and engagement are essential for moving our profession forward. I would be honored to represent my colleagues and serve as a voice for radiation therapists across our chapter.
Thank you to everyone who continues to mentor, support, and challenge me to lead with integrity.
#RadiationTherapy #RTAdvocacy #ProfessionalLeadership #ASRT #HealthcareLeadership #stayRAD

description.text: Social Media & Growth Marketing Strategist | Influencer & Creator Partnerships | Content Strategy | Analytics-Driven Campaigns
description.accessibilityText: Social Media & Growth Marketing Strategist | Influencer & Creator Partnerships | Content Strategy | Analytics-Driven Campaigns

subDescription.accessibilityText: 2 days ago • Visible to anyone on or off LinkedIn

text.text: Brenda B. likes this

One thing I’ve been focused on this year is getting better at connecting creative work to measurable outcomes.

Not just posting content, but asking:

🧐Did this drive engagement?  
💭Did it drive traffic?  
✍🏼Did it drive conversions?  

Marketing is fun when you’re creating things, but it gets really interesting when you can tie creative decisions back to actual performance. 📈

Recently I had the opportunity to concept and edit the creative for our very first campaign our team launched through Amazon Ads at JumpstartMD.🙌🏻 

As part of the process, I also repurposed and refined the creative to make it more concise, engaging, and storytelling-driven for the platform. 👩🏻‍💻

Watching the campaign go live and seeing early performance signals, including a strong conversion rate, has been a really rewarding part of the process.

Still learning every day, but I’m really grateful to be part of a team at JumpstartMD where I get to experiment, build campaigns, and see how the strategy plays out in real numbers. 🌟

#DigitalMarketing
#CreativeStrategy
#PerformanceMarketing
#Advertising

text.text: Brenda B. likes this

One of the biggest misconceptions about GLP-1 medications is that they automatically cause muscle loss. 
The truth? Muscle loss is preventable when weight loss is properly supported with:
 
✅ adequate protein 
✅ resistance training 
✅ supplementation 
✅ ongoing medical oversight 

In this InBody® scan example, one of our JumpstartMD members reduced body fat from 51 lbs → 32.1 lbs in 8 months while losing less than 1 lb of muscle mass. 

That’s the power of structured, medically supervised care. 

Interested in a clinician-guided approach to fat loss and body recomposition? Schedule a complimentary consultation: https://jsmd.us/4rG2IeU 

Proud to partner with InBody® (InBody USA) and grateful to have Lia Ha, PA-C, helping educate our community on how to lose fat without sacrificing strength. 

#GLP1 #BodyComposition #InBody #WeightLossMedicine #HormoneHealth #MetabolicHealth #JumpstartMD #ObesityMedicine #StrengthTraining #FatLoss

Reactive HR manages policies.

In healthcare especially, the benefits strategy is a growth strategy. The funding model behind the plan either protects the organization or quietly works against it.

More leaders are starting to realize that. 👏
